G

Game - Class in un.caen.model
Represents the game logic for the battle game.
Game(int, int) - Constructor for class un.caen.model.Game
Constructs a Game with a specified width and height for the grid.
Game(int, int, List<Player>) - Constructor for class un.caen.model.Game
Constructs a Game with a specified width, height, and a list of players.
GameBoardView - Class in un.caen.view
Represents the game board view for the battle game.
GameBoardView(GameController) - Constructor for class un.caen.view.GameBoardView
Constructs a GameBoardView with the specified GameController.
GameController - Class in un.caen.controller
The GameController class manages the game logic and player interactions in a grid-based game.
GameController(Game) - Constructor for class un.caen.controller.GameController
Constructs a GameController with the specified game model.
gameLoop() - Method in class un.caen.view.ConsoleView
 
getAmmo() - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Gun
Gets the current amount of ammunition in the gun.
getBoardDisplay() - Method in class un.caen.controller.GameController
Displays the current state of the game board.
getCell(Position) - Method in class un.caen.model.feild.Grid
Gets the cell at the specified position.
getColumnCount() - Method in class un.caen.view.GridModel
Returns the number of columns in the grid.
getColumnName(int) - Method in class un.caen.view.GridModel
Returns the column name for the specified column index.
getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class un.caen.controller.GameController
Retrieves the current player.
getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class un.caen.model.Game
Gets the current player whose turn it is.
getDamage() - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Weapon
Gets the damage dealt by the weapon.
getEnergy() - Method in interface un.caen.model.player.Fighter
Gets the current energy of the fighter.
getEnergy() - Method in class un.caen.model.player.Player
Gets the current energy of the player.
getEnergy() - Method in class un.caen.model.player.PlayerProxy
Returns the energy level of the player.
getGrid() - Method in class un.caen.controller.GameController
Retrieves the grid of the game.
getGrid() - Method in class un.caen.model.Game
Gets the game grid.
getHeight() - Method in class un.caen.model.feild.Grid
Gets the height of the grid.
getId() - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Item
Gets the ID of the item.
getItem() - Method in class un.caen.util.Cell
The `getItem()` method returns the item currently contained within the cell.
getName() - Method in class un.caen.model.player.Player
Gets the name of the player.
getName() - Method in class un.caen.model.player.PlayerProxy
Returns the name of the player.
getNextPosition(Direction) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Item
Gets the next position of the item based on the specified direction.
getNextPosition(Direction) - Method in class un.caen.model.player.Player
Gets the next position of the player based on the specified direction.
getOwnerPlayerId() - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Bomb
Gets the ID of the player who placed the bomb.
getOwnerPlayerId() - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Gun
Gets the ID of the player who owns the gun.
getOwnerPlayerId() - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Mine
Gets the ID of the player who placed the mine.
getPlayerProxies() - Method in class un.caen.controller.GameController
Returns the list of PlayerProxy objects representing the players in the game.
getPlayers() - Method in class un.caen.controller.GameController
Retrieves the list of players currently in the game.
getPlayers() - Method in class un.caen.model.Game
Gets the list of players in the game.
getPlayerStatus() - Method in class un.caen.controller.GameController
Retrieves the status of the players.
getPosition() - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Item
Gets the current position of the item.
getPosition() - Method in class un.caen.model.player.PlayerProxy
Returns the position of the player.
getPositionsAround() - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Item
Gets a list of positions around the item based on all possible directions.
getRange() - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Weapon
Gets the effective range of the weapon.
getRowCount() - Method in class un.caen.view.GridModel
Returns the number of rows in the grid.
getStrategy() - Method in class un.caen.model.player.Player
Gets the strategy of the player.
getValidInput(int, int) - Method in class un.caen.view.ConsoleView
 
getValueAt(int, int) - Method in class un.caen.view.GridModel
Returns the value at the specified row and column in the grid.
getWeapons() - Method in class un.caen.model.player.Player
Gets the list of weapons owned by the player.
getWeapons() - Method in class un.caen.model.player.PlayerProxy
Returns the list of weapons the player is carrying.
getWeaponsCount() - Method in class un.caen.model.player.Player
Gets the count of weapons owned by the player.
getWeaponsLimits() - Method in interface un.caen.model.player.Fighter
Gets the limit on the number of weapons the fighter can carry.
getWeaponsLimits() - Method in class un.caen.model.player.Player
Gets the limit on the number of weapons the player can carry.
getWidth() - Method in class un.caen.model.feild.Grid
Gets the width of the grid.
getX() - Method in class un.caen.util.Position
The `getX()` method returns the horizontal coordinate of the position.
getY() - Method in class un.caen.util.Position
The `getY()` method returns the vertical coordinate of the position.
Grid - Class in un.caen.model.feild
Represents the game grid, which consists of cells that can hold various items, including players, bombs, mines, and walls.
Grid(int, int) - Constructor for class un.caen.model.feild.Grid
Constructs a Grid with the specified width and height.
GRID_HEIGHT - Static variable in class un.caen.config.Config
The height of the game grid.
GRID_WIDTH - Static variable in class un.caen.config.Config
The width of the game grid.
GridModel - Class in un.caen.view
The `GridModel` class is an implementation of the `AbstractTableModel` class from the Swing library.
GridModel(int, int) - Constructor for class un.caen.view.GridModel
Constructs a new `GridModel` instance with the specified number of rows and columns.
GridModel(Grid) - Constructor for class un.caen.view.GridModel
Constructs a new `GridModel` instance from a `Grid` object.
Gun - Class in un.caen.model.items
Represents a gun weapon in the game that can be used by players.
Gun(int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class un.caen.model.items.Gun
Constructs a Gun with the specified ammunition, owner player ID, and visibility setting.
GunAttack(Player, Weapon, Direction) - Method in class un.caen.model.Game
Handles a gun attack from a player in a specified direction.
